0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","$L2",null,{"toc":[{"depth":1,"url":"#template-two-panel-browse","title":"Template: two-panel-browse"},{"depth":2,"url":"#key-patterns","title":"Key patterns"},{"depth":2,"url":"#how-to-load-sub-files","title":"How to load sub-files"}],"children":[["$","$L3",null,{"children":"Template: two-panel-browse"}],["$","$L4",null,{"children":"Generates a side-by-side reconciliation screen with two independent po-table panels."}],["$","$L5",null,{"children":[["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h1","id":"template-two-panel-browse","children":"Template: two-panel-browse"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Generates a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"side-by-side reconciliation screen"}]," with two independent ",["$","code",null,{"children":"po-table"}]," panels.\nThe user selects one row from the left panel and one from the right, then confirms a\npairing action (card reconciliation, document matching, A/R conciliation)."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Use cases: card reconciliation, accounts payable/receivable matching, document pairing."}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Before using this template"}],", read the column-width rule in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"templates-two-panel-browse-html.md"}]," (Horizontal scroll prevention section). Failing to calculate widths will cause horizontal scroll on both browse panels.\nUse ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stacked-browse"}]," for vertically stacked master-detail tables with keyboard navigation.\nUse ",["$","code",null,{"children":"master-detail"}]," for inline expandable rows inside a single table."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","hr",null,{}],"\n",["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","id":"key-patterns","children":"Key patterns"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Pattern"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Implementation"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Dynamic height (no page scroll)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"browseHeight = computed(() => Math.max(180, winH() - OFFSET))"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No horizontal scroll"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Sum of all ",["$","code",null,{"children":"p-width"}]," values (including checkbox 41px) must equal panel width"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Single-select per browse"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["On ",["$","code",null,{"children":"(p-selected)"}],", clear previous selection via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"items.update(...)"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Cross-browse validation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Left must be selected before right; validate in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"(p-selected)"}]," of right browse"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Button alignment with po-input"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":".header-botoes \\{ margin-bottom: 8px \\}"}]," — cancels po-input's internal 8px error-space"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Checkbox column width"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Override with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"::ng-deep .po-table-column-selectable \\{ width: 41px !important \\}"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Keyboard navigation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"@HostListener('window:keydown')"}]," routes ArrowUp/Down to active panel; Tab switches panel"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Scroll sync"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"_scrollRowIntoView()"}]," walks DOM for real scrollable ancestor; callers use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"setTimeout(..., 50)"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Focus ring suppression"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"::ng-deep *:focus, *:focus-visible \\{ outline: none \\}"}]," — prevents scroll artifact at browse edge"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Active panel indicator"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"border-top-color"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":".browse-titulo"}]," — never ","$L7"," on po-table-container"]}]]}]]}]]}]}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La"]}]]}],["$Lb","$Lc"],"$Ld"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"MkBKlGOOnjUaRtYPMio3z"}
